$comment: Tool declarations for this dir (the offloaded config.tools[]). A tool runs by name as tools/<name>.ps1; an entry here adds how to invoke it + metadata. A bare script with no entry is still callable by name (zero-arg). Delete the example below and declare your own.

tools.name: example_check
tools.description: Example: an action's oracle. Reads input on stdin (the action declares stdin:code) and exits 0 on success, non-zero on failure (drives on_success/on_failure).
